summary: Resolved 42 vs 57 discrepancy (42 is correct: counted all pipe lines in Axioms.lean including FrameClass enum and pattern match arms). Formula has 6 primitive constructors. PatternKey has 5 features. Policy network output dimension is 42 axioms + 7 inference rules = 49 total actions. BimodalLogic already implements complete JSON serialization layer (DataExport.lean) and LabeledFormula record structure (DatasetGenerator.lean) that defines the canonical schema. Full Python schema and action space arrays specified.

artifacts.summary: Complete schema design: 6-constructor Formula AST with tag-based JSON, 42-axiom action space enumeration resolving the 42 vs 57 discrepancy, 5-feature PatternKey, LabeledFormula training record schema with proof trace and countermodel fields, extensibility plan for Logos operators
